message:
feat(storage): add write_op_sync for synchronous fallback when WBQ is unavailable

Exposes a public write_op_sync() that executes a WriteOp on the caller
thread, intended as a durability fallback when the write-behind queue
is unavailable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
